skills.name: nestjs-best-practices
skills.description: Highest-priority NestJS API best practices for coding agents. Covers modules, providers, DTOs, validation, guards, interceptors, Prisma, GraphQL, testing, and 19 database failure patterns.

skills.name: nextjs-best-practices
skills.description: Highest-priority Next.js full-stack best practices for coding agents. Covers App Router, Server Components, API routes, data fetching, caching, bundle optimization, and security.
